text.tspan: Share of primary energy consumption from renewable sources, 2023

Measured as a percentage of
primary energy
using the
substitution method
. Renewables include hydropower,
solar, wind, geothermal, bioenergy, wave, and tidal, but not traditional biofuels, which can be a key energy
Data source: Energy Institute - Statistical Review of World Energy (2024)
